StateMachine.name: RuntimeTest
StateMachine.description: This is a test FSM for the Runtime Mode

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

Key.name: foo_str2
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

Key.name: pose_bytes
Key.description: Serialized Pose message stored as bytes in the blackboard.

Key.name: pose_bytes__type
Key.description: Type information for the serialized Pose message.

StateMachine.name: Demo3
StateMachine.description:
Outcomes: - outcome4: Final outcome
Input Keys: - pose_bytes: Serialized Pose message stored as bytes in the blackboard. (str) - pose_bytes__type: Type information for the serialized Pose message. (str)
Output Keys: - pose_bytes: Serialized Pose message stored as bytes in the blackboard. (str) - pose_bytes__type: Type information for the serialized Pose message. (str)

State.name: Foo
State.description:
Produces a counter string and stores it in the blackboard while the counter is below the threshold.
Outcomes: - outcome2: Counter reached the threshold. - outcome1: Counter is below the threshold
Output Keys: - foo_str: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: Formatted counter string written by FooState.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

Key.name: foo_str2
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

StateMachine.name: a
StateMachine.description:
Demo FSM that alternates between Foo and Bar states
Outcomes: - outcome4: Final outcome
Input Keys: - foo_str: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState. (str)
Output Keys: - foo_str: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState. (str)

StateMachine.name: b
StateMachine.description:
Demo FSM that alternates between Foo and Bar states
Outcomes: - outcome4: Final outcome
Input Keys: - foo_str: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState. (str)
Output Keys: - foo_str: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState. (str)
